Verbatim_Feedback: Very smooth process. Amit from Pune was extremely helpful and kept me informed at every step.
Improvement_Suggestion: None — excellent experience

Verbatim_Feedback: Too many documents asked. Some were repeated. The checklist was confusing.
Improvement_Suggestion: Simplify document checklist. Avoid duplicate requests.

Verbatim_Feedback: Disbursement delayed by 3 weeks because of builder NOC. HDFC should manage builder coordination better.
Improvement_Suggestion: Builder relationship management needs improvement.

Verbatim_Feedback: Digital login was easy. In-principle approval came in 2 days. Impressed.
Improvement_Suggestion: App UI could be more intuitive for first-time users.

Verbatim_Feedback: Penal interest charged for 1-day delay is unfair. Very disappointed with the rigid policy.
Improvement_Suggestion: Grace period for EMI payment should be at least 3 days.

Verbatim_Feedback: Good NRI support. Power of Attorney process was well guided. Rate could be more competitive.
Improvement_Suggestion: NRI rates should be at par with domestic salaried.

Verbatim_Feedback: Rejected for minor LTV deviation. No one explained alternatives or next steps. Felt abandoned.
Improvement_Suggestion: Post-rejection counseling and alternative product suggestion needed.

Verbatim_Feedback: Seamless BT process. Rate is best in market. The team proactively offered top-up too. Excellent!
Improvement_Suggestion: Perfect experience — replicate for all BT cases.

Verbatim_Feedback: Applied online at midnight and got in-principle approval by morning. Truly digital-first experience.
Improvement_Suggestion: Allow document upload via WhatsApp for convenience.

Verbatim_Feedback: Amit at Pune branch was very patient explaining all terms. Sanction came in 5 working days.
Improvement_Suggestion: Provide sanction letter in regional language option.

Verbatim_Feedback: Process was okay but had to visit branch twice for document submission. Once should be enough.
Improvement_Suggestion: Single-visit document collection with proper checklist.

Verbatim_Feedback: NACH mandate keeps bouncing despite having funds. This is causing late payment marks on my CIBIL.
Improvement_Suggestion: Improve NACH mandate registration process and provide backup payment options.

Verbatim_Feedback: Rate went up by 0.50% without any prior notice. EMI jumped significantly. Very unfair practice.
Improvement_Suggestion: Advance SMS notification at least 30 days before rate reset.

Verbatim_Feedback: Call center agent was knowledgeable and resolved my query in one call. No transfers needed.
Improvement_Suggestion: Extend call center hours to 10 PM for working professionals.

Verbatim_Feedback: PMAY subsidy credited smoothly. The team guided us through every step of the application.
Improvement_Suggestion: Create a dedicated PMAY helpline for subsidy tracking.

Verbatim_Feedback: App keeps crashing when I try to download my statement. Have tried 5 times in 2 weeks.
Improvement_Suggestion: Fix app stability issues. Provide web portal as alternative.

Verbatim_Feedback: Part prepayment process was hassle-free. Did it online in 5 minutes. Tenure reduced immediately.
Improvement_Suggestion: Show projected savings before confirming prepayment.

Verbatim_Feedback: Insurance claim after co-applicant's death has been pending for 3 months. No empathy shown at all.
Improvement_Suggestion: Fast-track insurance claims for bereavement cases with dedicated support.

Verbatim_Feedback: Double EMI debited in one month. Had to run around to get reversal. Caused me serious inconvenience.
Improvement_Suggestion: Automated duplicate payment detection and instant reversal system.

Verbatim_Feedback: Shifted from Axis to HDFC smoothly. Rate saving of 0.40% is significant over 15 years. Very happy.
Improvement_Suggestion: Offer loyalty benefits for BT customers to retain them long-term.

Verbatim_Feedback: Sanction took 12 days which felt long. Documentation could have been collected more efficiently.
Improvement_Suggestion: Target 7-day sanction for salaried customers with complete documents.

Verbatim_Feedback: Requested rate reduction and got 0.15% concession within a week. Good retention program.
Improvement_Suggestion: Proactively offer rate reductions to loyal customers annually.

Verbatim_Feedback: Loan closed 45 days ago and still chasing for original documents. Unacceptable delays.
Improvement_Suggestion: Maximum 15-day SLA for document return after loan closure.

Verbatim_Feedback: Had to explain my issue to 3 different agents. Each time I was transferred and had to repeat everything.
Improvement_Suggestion: Implement CRM so agents can see customer history without asking again.

Verbatim_Feedback: Called 7 times over 2 weeks for a simple interest certificate. Nobody took ownership.
Improvement_Suggestion: Assign single point of contact for service requests.

Verbatim_Feedback: Staff at Deccan branch was dismissive when I asked about prepayment options. Felt unwelcome.
Improvement_Suggestion: Regular customer service training for branch staff.

Verbatim_Feedback: Online application was smooth but tracking status on app was difficult. Had to call branch.
Improvement_Suggestion: Real-time application status tracking on mobile app.

Verbatim_Feedback: BT process was fine but the foreclosure amount from previous lender did not match. Created confusion.
Improvement_Suggestion: Coordinate with previous lender on exact foreclosure amount before disbursement.

Verbatim_Feedback: Original sale deed was missing from returned document bundle. Had to escalate multiple times to get it.
Improvement_Suggestion: Implement barcode tracking for each original document in custody.

Verbatim_Feedback: EMI schedule and outstanding details are clearly shown in the app. Very useful for planning.
Improvement_Suggestion: Add feature to simulate prepayment impact directly in app.

Verbatim_Feedback: Waited 90 minutes at the branch just to collect a statement. No token system. Total chaos.
Improvement_Suggestion: Token-based queue system with estimated wait time display.

Verbatim_Feedback: Rate reduction offered was only 0.10% when I expected at least 0.25% to match competition.
Improvement_Suggestion: More aggressive rate matching for existing customers with good track record.

Verbatim_Feedback: PMAY category was wrongly assigned. Subsidy shortfall of INR 1.3 lakh. Very frustrating error.
Improvement_Suggestion: Double verification of PMAY category at application stage.

Verbatim_Feedback: Sanction amount reduced by INR 5 lakh from in-principle letter without explanation. Felt cheated.
Improvement_Suggestion: Any sanction variation from in-principle must be communicated with detailed reasons.

Verbatim_Feedback: Prepayment process was smooth but tenure recalculation took 3 extra days which was unnecessary.
Improvement_Suggestion: Instant tenure recalculation upon prepayment processing.

Verbatim_Feedback: Collection agent harassed me at my office for a 15-day delay. Absolutely humiliating experience.
Improvement_Suggestion: Strict guidelines against workplace visits for minor delays.

Verbatim_Feedback: Document collection was well organized. Got a proper checklist and everything was done in one visit.
Improvement_Suggestion: This branch model should be replicated everywhere.

Verbatim_Feedback: Recovery agent came to my office for a 15-day overdue EMI. I was mortified in front of colleagues.
Improvement_Suggestion: Ban workplace visits by recovery agents. Use only digital and phone channels.

Verbatim_Feedback: Disbursement was quick once all documents were in. Technical team was responsive.
Improvement_Suggestion: Reduce time between sanction and disbursement to under 3 days.

Verbatim_Feedback: Best home loan experience. From login to sanction in 4 days. Deepa was fantastic throughout.
Improvement_Suggestion: Nothing to improve. Deepa deserves recognition!

Verbatim_Feedback: LAP sanction was fast for such a large amount. Legal and technical done simultaneously saved time.
Improvement_Suggestion: Parallel processing of legal and technical should be standard for all cases.

Verbatim_Feedback: PMAY eligibility check and subsidy calculation was explained very clearly at the branch.
Improvement_Suggestion: Provide PMAY eligibility calculator on website.

Verbatim_Feedback: Good experience overall. Sanction in 6 working days. Rate is competitive for govt employees.
Improvement_Suggestion: Special faster processing lane for government employees.

Verbatim_Feedback: Saved INR 3800 per month on EMI by transferring from LIC HFL. The team handled everything end to end.
Improvement_Suggestion: Share BT savings projection upfront to help customers decide faster.

Verbatim_Feedback: NRI login process has too many steps. POA verification took very long. Could be streamlined.
Improvement_Suggestion: Digital POA verification through video KYC for NRI customers.

Verbatim_Feedback: BT from Bajaj HF to HDFC went smoothly. Rate saving is genuine and the process was transparent.
Improvement_Suggestion: Offer BT customers a free home insurance year as welcome benefit.

Verbatim_Feedback: Applied on Sunday. Got a call from branch on Monday morning. Very prompt follow-up impressed me.
Improvement_Suggestion: Weekend applications should trigger instant auto-acknowledgement.

Verbatim_Feedback: Self-employed documentation requirements are excessive. Submitted 47 pages. Seems like overkill.
Improvement_Suggestion: Rationalize document requirements for self-employed professionals.

Verbatim_Feedback: First home dream came true thanks to PMAY subsidy and HDFC's guidance. Amit ji was like family.
Improvement_Suggestion: More awareness campaigns about PMAY in tier-2 cities.

Verbatim_Feedback: Defence rate was applied without any issues. Sanction letter was clear and detailed. Good experience.
Improvement_Suggestion: Dedicated defence segment desk at all major branches.

Verbatim_Feedback: App shows EMI details but does not allow downloading PDF statements directly. Have to call branch.
Improvement_Suggestion: Enable direct PDF download of all certificates and statements from app.

Verbatim_Feedback: Applied for top-up loan 20 days ago. No update. Nobody picks up the phone at the branch.
Improvement_Suggestion: Mandatory callback within 4 hours for any missed branch calls.
